overall_learning_outcomes.assessment: Assess a patient's functional needs, desired activities and home environment to determine whether foundational equipment can be safely provided or requires escalation to OT.
overall_learning_outcomes.decision_making: Make safe and timely clinical decisions regarding equipment provision, distinguishing low-risk foundational equipment from complex or custom equipment requiring escalation.
overall_learning_outcomes.setup_and_training: Select and set up appropriate foundational equipment safely; train patients and carers in its use.
overall_learning_outcomes.documentation: Document clinical reasoning, equipment selection, safety verification, training and handover to meet professional and safety requirements.
